reasoning: DeepSeek is currently a strong contender, recently launching DeepSeek-V3 and R1, but the AI space is moving incredibly fast, and major players like OpenAI (GPT-5, o3), Google (Gemini 2, 3), and Anthropic (Claude 3.5 Opus, Claude 4) are expected to release massive frontier models by the end of 2025.
